source_notes: Compiled from web research May 11, 2026 — see macro-data.md for source URLs. Trailing/forward P/Es vary slightly by source; ranges shown where material.

stocks.name: NVIDIA
stocks.key_risk: Hyperscaler capex pause: 4 customers (MSFT, META, GOOGL, AMZN) drive >40% of data-center revenue and their FCF is collapsing under capex.
stocks.downside_scenario: If any one hyperscaler signals a capex moderation on Q2 call, multi-day -10% gap is the historical playbook (see Aug 2024).
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Elevated — sits within 1% of ATH after a 99% one-year run.

stocks.name: Microsoft
stocks.key_risk: $190B 2026 capex (up from prior $150B guide); Barclays models FCF down 28% in FY2026. AI revenue $37B run-rate is real but rounding error vs. capex.
stocks.downside_scenario: Azure growth deceleration <33% YoY would re-rate multiple back toward 19x forward — that alone is ~10% downside.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Moderate — already weakened YTD but valuation still rich vs. FCF compression.

stocks.name: Alphabet
stocks.key_risk: $185B 2026 capex; FCF projected toward zero in 2027 per asymco analysis. PE is 31% above 4-quarter average just as AI search cannibalization risk rises.
stocks.downside_scenario: Any quarter where Search ad revenue shows AI-overview cannibalization = -15% gap. The cheapest of the AI giants but only because the others ran further.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Moderate — best fundamentals but already 153% TTM run.

stocks.name: Meta Platforms
stocks.key_risk: Raised 2026 capex guide from $115–135B to $125–145B. Barclays models 90% FCF drop. Q1 EPS beat was 60%+ inflated by $8B one-time tax benefit.
stocks.downside_scenario: Already fell 6% after-hours on capex raise April 29. Next capex raise = -10% to -15%. Zuck is openly telling Street to stop expecting margin discipline.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: High — Street is clearly losing patience with the spend story.

stocks.name: Broadcom
stocks.key_risk: P/E 91% above 10-yr median; RSI 79 = clear sell signal; custom-silicon thesis depends on Google/Anthropic/OpenAI all sustaining wallet share. Customer concentration is brutal.
stocks.downside_scenario: Any one of the three named custom-silicon customers shifting back to merchant GPU (NVDA) = -20% on the AVGO multiple alone.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Very high — overbought RSI + 80x P/E + 127% one-year return is the textbook setup.

stocks.name: Micron Technology
stocks.key_risk: Sold out through 2026 IS the bull case — but memory cycles peak when supply is sold out. Forward P/E of 7.58 implies the Street already expects 2027 earnings to fall.
stocks.downside_scenario: Memory ASPs roll over in late-2026 as HBM capacity additions hit. Classic 'sold out at the top' setup. 30–40% drawdowns are normal in memory cycle turns.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: High — every prior memory cycle has ended with a 40%+ drawdown.

stocks.name: Advanced Micro Devices
stocks.key_risk: 320% in 12 months. Forward P/E 63 is 72% above semi industry median of 37. Story stock priced for perfect MI400 execution against NVDA Rubin.
stocks.downside_scenario: Any MI400 delivery slip or NVDA Rubin overperform = -25%. Mean-reversion risk explicitly flagged by technicals.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Very high — leveraged momentum names that triple in 12 months rarely escape without a 25%+ correction.

stocks.name: Palantir Technologies
stocks.key_risk: P/E 217 even after the -14% YTD drawdown. GuruFocus 'GF Value' of $63 implies 127% overvalued. $684M stock-based comp annual = real shareholder dilution.
stocks.downside_scenario: Q2 guide miss or any commercial-revenue deceleration = -30%. Stock is the cleanest 'priced for perfection' name in the basket.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Very high — the multiple alone makes this asymmetric to the downside.

stocks.name: Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X
stocks.key_risk: 3x leverage means everything we are saying about NVDA/AVGO/AMD/MU happens to SOXL holders three times over. RSI hit 94 recently — historically precedes 15–30% multi-day drops.
stocks.downside_scenario: A 10% pullback in the underlying SOX index = ~30% in SOXL. 2022 drawdown peak: -83%.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: Near-certain — the only question is timing.

stocks.name: Strategy Inc (fmr MicroStrategy)
stocks.key_risk: mNAV of 1.23x means you are paying $1.23 for every $1 of underlying BTC. Premium already collapsed from 4x at peak. BTC fell 36% from ATH and MSTR fell 60% — that 2.4x downside leverage is the math.
stocks.downside_scenario: BTC drops another 10% on yen-carry unwind or risk-off and MSTR likely does -25% on combined NAV compression + BTC drop.
stocks.probability_10_30pct_drawdown: High — and unlike the AI names, holders here are still up huge over 12 months and can rotate to spot BTC or HYPE with less leverage risk.
